questionHtml: The life expectancy of a human at the time of the study was 80 years. Estimate the porosity of the bones of the individual who was approximately 32 years old.
markschemeHtml:
6 %;

Accept answers in the range 6.0 to 6.5 %.
Percentage sign required.
